mapper.select: select d.id, d.reconciliation_id as reconciliationId, d.batch_no as batchNo, d.channel_code as channelCode, d.bill_date as billDate, d.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, d.trade_type as tradeType, d.amount, d.fee, d.trade_time as tradeTime, d.match_status as matchStatus, d.matched_order_no as matchedOrderNo, d.match_message as matchMessage, d.created_at as createTime from payment_channel_bill_detail d where d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and d.reconciliation_id = #{reconciliationId} and d.del_flag = 0 order by d.trade_time asc, d.id asc
